meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-08 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Solid recovery morning: 7h25 at score 84 off a 22:44 bedtime — 20 minutes above the 7-day average and a genuinely good night, though a step down from Monday's exceptional 91. The architecture was balanced: deep 1h08, REM 1h45 and light 4h32, with only 19 minutes awake. The autonomic side softened after yesterday's hack-squat session: HRV eased to 38 (−5 from the previous night, three below the 7-day baseline of 41) and RHR ticked up to 55 (+2) — both mild and expected after a heavy lift, not red flags. Morning stress is a calm 18. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Tue 7 (Tuesday–Wednesday); Thursday's night (Jul 2) remains the untracked slot on the chart. With a full, good-quality night behind you, you're recovered for today's planned swim-interval session.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Solidan oporavak: 7h25 uz ocjenu 84 i lijeganje u 22:44 — 20 minuta iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka i zbilja dobra noć, iako korak niže od ponedjeljkovih izvrsnih 91. Arhitektura je bila uravnotežena: duboki 1h08, REM 1h45 i lagani 4h32, uz samo 19 minuta budnosti. Autonomna slika se smekšala nakon jučerašnjeg hack squata: HRV se spustio na 38 (−5 u odnosu na prethodnu noć, tri ispod 7-dnevne osnovice od 41), a RHR se popeo na 55 (+2) — oboje blago i očekivano nakon teškog dizanja, ne alarm. Jutarnji stres miran 18. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Uto 7 (utorak–srijeda); četvrtkova noć (2.7.) i dalje je nezabilježeni termin na grafu. Uz punu, kvalitetnu noć iza sebe, oporavljen si za današnji planirani trening intervala plivanja.
